prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3779名、4059名、7198名、4118名、4673名。2023年出现异常波动（7198名），2024年迅速恢复至4118名，2025年小幅后移至4673名。近两年基准位次稳定在4100–4700区间，2025年位次较2024年后移约555名，整体呈小幅后移趋势；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年181人、2022年169人、2023年174人、2024年174人、2025年170人、2026年（招生计划文件）174人。2026年较2025年扩招4人（+2.4%），小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年均为第8名，2025–2026年降至第9名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列（Top10），对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏正面：新闻传播学科全国排名稳居前列，招生透明度高；全国高校食堂排名第一（约35个食堂），生活条件受学生好评。抖音热度总排名第22位（较热），综合热度约222.6万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平。历史无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期稳定；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个学科：机械工程A+、光学工程A+、电气工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A、材料科学与工程A、物理学A、管理科学与工程A等。优势学科覆盖该校在山东招生的主要专业大类（计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程、机械类、临床医学等），学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示：计算机类（高热推荐）、临床医学（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）均为高热推荐专业，与华科优势学科高度重合，进一步推升报考热度。山东省考生总数持续增长：2021年约54.4万→2025年约68.1万→2026年约72万，竞争逐年加剧。；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，在山东省招生规模较大（2025年约170人），属于跨省招生中占比偏高的985高校。山东省考生对武汉地区高校认可度较高，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次小幅后移趋势、2026年扩招4人（+2.4%）对位次的轻微后移作用、山东省考生总数持续增长（2026年约72万）带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉正面及优势学科与热门专业高度重合等因素，在，考虑考生竞争加剧因素做小幅前移修正。预测2026年最低录取位次约4689名，波动区间4189–5189名。

- 临床医学（八年制）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 华中科技大学作为全国顶尖985高校（软科第9名），在山东省综合类招生位次稳定在4100–4700区间。预测2026年最低位次约4689名，区间4189–5189名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（电气、人工智能、电子信息、机械等），一档专业（光电启明实验班、临床八年制、计算机类）作为冲刺选择，三档专业（材料类、生物科学类）作为稳妥保底。华科优势学科与当前高热推荐专业高度重合，报考热度有望维持高位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 3779, 4059, 7198, 4118, and 4673 respectively. An abnormal fluctuation occurred in 2023 (7198), quickly recovering to 4118 in 2024, and slightly shifting back to 4673 in 2025. In the past two years, the baseline ranking has stabilized in the 4100–4700 range. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 555 places compared to 2024, showing a slight overall backward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 181 in 2021, 169 in 2022, 174 in 2023, 174 in 2024, 170 in 2025, and 174 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 4 students (+2.4%), slightly easing competition pressure, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024, dropping to 9th in 2025–2026, firmly among the top national universities (Top 10), consistently attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation is slightly positive: the Journalism and Communication discipline ranks steadily among the top nationwide, with high admission transparency. It ranks first in the national university cafeteria ranking (about 35 cafeterias), and living conditions are well-received by students. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.226 million, and short video exposure at an upper-middle level. There is no history of admission cutoff line breaks or sharp drops, maintaining stable psychological expectations for applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines were rated A- or above: Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Physics A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc. The advantageous disciplines cover the main major categories recruited in Shandong (Computer, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical, Clinical Medicine, etc.), highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of major popularity in 2026 shows: Computer (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) are all highly recommended majors, highly overlapping with HUST's advantageous disciplines, further boosting application enthusiasm. The total number of examinees in Shandong Province continues to grow: approximately 544,000 in 2021 → 681,000 in 2025 → 720,000 in 2026, intensifying competition year by year. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong (about 170 in 2025), making it a 985 university with a higher proportion of cross-provincial enrollment. Shandong examinees have a high recognition of universities in the Wuhan area, with no significant regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward trend in historical rankings, the slight backward effect on rankings from the 2026 enrollment increase of 4 students (+2.4%), the intensified competition from the continuous growth of Shandong examinees (about 720,000 in 2026), the positive university reputation, and the high overlap between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, a slight forward adjustment is made to account for increased competition. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 4689, with a fluctuation range of 4189–5189.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: As a top national 985 university (Soft Science 9th), Huazhong University of Science and Technology has a stable admission ranking in Shandong Province comprehensive category in the 4100–4700 range. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4689, with a range of 4189–5189. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical, AI, Electronic Information, Mechanical, etc.) as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors (Optoelectronic Qiming Experimental Class, Clinical Eight-Year, Computer) as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Biological Sciences) as safe backups. HUST's advantageous disciplines highly overlap with currently highly recommended majors, so application enthusiasm is expected to remain high.
